acceptance_criteria.text: Stage 2+3 improves Telegram proposal review and evidence-based pattern mining.
proof: Telegram review supports pagination, industry filters, examples, source counts, and readable risk/confidence.
Monthly mining loads real service/news/review-reply samples from successful businesses.
Proposals are gated by minimum entities and sample evidence when sample data is available.
Existing JSON fields store examples and source counts; no schema migration required.
Production app/worker and Telegram bot restarted successfully.
Telegram bot service is active and setMyCommands returned 200.
gaps: Live Telegram button click was not performed by the agent after deployment.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: python3 -m py_compile src/core/industry_patterns.py src/core/industry_pattern_recalibration.py src/core/service_optimization_verticals.py src/core/service_keyword_scoring.py src/core/card_automation.py src/services/content_plan_service.py src/main.py src/worker.py src/telegram_bot.py

python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_industry_patterns.py tests/test_beauty_service_optimization.py tests/test_service_keyword_scoring.py tests/test_content_plan_generation.py tests/test_card_automation.py tests/test_telegram_response_router.py tests/test_telegram_dashboard_copy.py
known_gaps: Live Telegram button click was not performed by the agent after deployment.
